---
title: "2026 AIML4OS funathon"
subtitle: "Let's discover ML and AI!"
listing:
    id: sample-listings
    contents: subjects
    type: grid
    sort: "number"
    categories: true
    fields: [image, title, github]
    template: cards.ejs
---

<!-- ![](img/funathon_2026.png){height="400" fig-align="center"} -->

The 2026 funathon will take place on __May 27th and 28th__. If you want to register, see [here](/about.qmd).

<!-- <br>

::: {#sample-listings}
:::

<br> -->

All resources developed for the funathon are available on the [`Github AIML4OS`](https://github.com/orgs/AIML4OS/teams/wp6-funathon/repositories) webpage.
